name: Marriott International, Inc.
description: Marriott International, Inc. is a leading American multinational hospitality company based in Bethesda, Maryland. It operates, franchises, and licenses a vast portfolio of lodging brands, including hotel, residential, and timeshare properties. With approximately 9,000 properties across more than 30 leading brands in 141 countries and territories, Marriott is one of the largest hotel chains in the world. The company focuses on providing diverse travel experiences, ranging from luxury accommodations to extended-stay options, while leveraging its Marriott Bonvoy loyalty program to connect with millions of travelers globally.
